delivered_state.security_center_panel: delivered in commit 87263bd; custom SecurityCenterPanel component added to /configuracoes containing interactive PostgreSQL RLS scanner, simulated Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) OTP toggle with sonner toasts, and styled terminal logs showing database audit triggers mutations.
delivered_state.responsividade_mobile_refinement: delivered in commit 24d775f; responsive table columns in HistoricoGeracoes.tsx hiding less critical metadata on md/sm viewports, and flex-col sm:flex-row stackable document panels in PortalDiretor.tsx preventing text overlap on smaller devices
delivered_state.painel_visual_polish: delivered in PR #79; 10 cirurgical refinements: removed font-light hero subtitle, removed empty 'Total' label in donut, replaced font-mono numerics with Inter+tabular-nums across all cards, CentralDocumental gets transition-shadow hover lift, TopReprogramados numbering becomes left rail (no truncate cutoff), bar gradient becomes solid, DistribuicaoDeRecursos pct color consistency, HistoricoGeracoes row meta becomes horizontal + hover affordance, TableHeader tracking adjusted to eyebrow institucional
delivered_state.escolas_microcopy_fix: delivered in PR #78; 'Em breve' misleading label replaced with 'Demonstrativo Básico disponível' affordance
delivered_state.admin_roles_ui: delivered in PR #75 (Marco 6B v0); /configuracoes shows real users from auth.users JOIN user_roles via list_admin_users RPC; assign and revoke roles via UI; anti-self-lockout guardrail; migration 20260517130000 applied to prod
delivered_state.painel_historico_runs: delivered in PR #76; HistoricoGeracoesCard on Painel showing top 5 most recent document_generation_runs with status icons + relative time + totals; aproveita base persistida do PR #73
delivered_state.painel_executivo_operacional_gad: delivered in PR #73; page title 'Painel Executivo-Operacional · GAD · 4ª CRE'; sidebar 'Dashboard' renamed to 'Painel'; CentralDocumental + TopReprogramados + DistribuicaoDeRecursos cards added; index.html cleaned (Lovable references removed)
delivered_state.geracao_em_lote_163_demonstrativos: delivered in PR #73; library generateDemonstrativosLote + hook useGerarDemonstrativosLote; AbortSignal honored; batched (default 6); history persisted in document_generation_runs; migration 20260517120000 applied to prod via supabase db push; types regenerated
delivered_state.plano_global_v4_2: adopted in PR #72; v4.1 preserved as historic; Radar de Inteligencia Institucional formalized as transversal directive
delivered_state.demonstrativo_basico_individual: concluded and merged; production deploy reported operationally; hardened with audits in PR #57
delivered_state.fase_2b_edicao_cadastral_minima: implemented (PR #63), polished (PR #70), atomic via RPC (PR #71); migration applied to prod; smoke UI pending
delivered_state.stack_modernization: React 19, Vite 7, Vitest 4, jsdom 29; xlsx removed; ExcelJS consolidated; 0 vulnerabilities; bundle reduced 21%
delivered_state.fiscal_poc: isolated Python POC in tools/fiscal-extraction/ with validators, governance docs, ADR preliminar (DRAFT, not merged) — frozen until MVP CRE
delivered_state.documents_panel: wired to real generator and covered by tests
delivered_state.governance_hygiene: AGENTS.md, README, CI, lockfile, deps all hardened

document_generation_constraints: Fill MEMORIA directly from vw_unidade_detalhe data (Opção B)
Do not depend on the BASE sheet for the individual file
Do not depend on XLOOKUP for the individual file
Do not publish templates in public/ with real consolidated BASE data
Remove the BASE sheet from generated individual workbooks if present
Preserve template layout, formulas, borders and merged cells
Keep official document rules under human review
mandatory_before_task: Verify the actual GitHub main/head/code before deciding
radar_obligatory_questions: Existe fonte estruturada antes de digitar ou fazer OCR?
Existe padrão consolidado em sistemas públicos, ERPs ou design systems?
A tarefa pode virar alerta, status, histórico, gráfico, relatório ou evidência?
A solução reduz clique, memória, retrabalho ou planilha paralela?
A interface mostra o próximo passo ou apenas exibe dados?
A entrega é segura para dados reais, perfis, RLS, arquivos e auditoria?
O ganho pode ser demonstrado visualmente para chefia e Alta Administração?
A abordagem é adequada para 2026 ou apenas uma solução provisória?

documentation_update_policy.rule: Documentation follows development; it must not trap the project in reconciliation loops.
when_to_open_doc_only_pr: When documentation can induce the next task to run against the wrong milestone or file path
When it marks completed work as pending or pending work as completed in a way that changes decisions
When a new decision changes scope, priority, safety or acceptance criteria
when_to_fold_into_next_pr: Minor commit SHA drift without operational consequence
Purely historical metadata that does not affect the next task
Small wording updates that do not alter priority or scope
